# Workspace Copilot Instructions

Use these rules for work in this repository.

## Ground Rules

- Do not speculate about product requirements, features, users, architecture, timelines, or implementation details.
- If something is not explicitly confirmed, leave it undefined or record it as an open question.
- Prefer asking for clarification over filling gaps with assumptions.
- Keep new documentation neutral until details are confirmed.

## Editing Expectations

- Make minimal, focused changes.
- Preserve existing structure and wording unless a change is requested.
- When summarizing work, distinguish confirmed facts from open questions.

## Documentation Expectations

- Keep planning and requirements documents aligned with the current confirmed state.
- Do not write future-state content as if it already exists.
- Use placeholders only when they are clearly marked as pending definition.
